conversation.content: You are a customer service agent for a travel company. Today's date: <REDACTED>. You are currently helping customer user_003. Use the available tools to help the customer.
I have two hotel reservations in Chicago — HR-I07A and HR-I07B. What are the cancellation policies for each? I might need to cancel one.

Here are the cancellation policies for your two Chicago hotel reservations:

- HR-I07A — Chicago Inn
  - Room type: standard
  - Stay: 2026-06-20 to 2026-06-23
  - Cancellation policy:
    - 48+ hours before check-in: free cancellation
    - 24–48 hours before check-in: 50% of first night charged
    - Under 24 hours before check-in: full first night charged

- HR-I07B — Chicago Grand Suite
  - Room type: suite
  - Stay: 2026-06-20 to 2026-06-22
  - Cancellation policy:
    - Non-refundable
    - Full charge applies regardless of when you cancel

Since today is 2026-06-15, HR-I07A is currently still in the free-cancellation window. HR-I07B would still be fully non-refundable.

If you want, I can also help you:
- compare which one makes more sense to keep, or
- preview the exact cancellation terms for one before actually canceling it.

rules.standard_room_48h_plus: Free cancellation if 48+ hours before check-in
rules.standard_room_24_48h: 50% of first night charge if 24-48 hours before check-in
rules.standard_room_under_24h: Full first night charge if <24 hours before check-in
rules.suite: Suite bookings are non-refundable (full charge regardless of timing)

conversation.content: Thanks — one correction: my loyalty tier is platinum, not basic. For the standard room, can you also explain the general cancellation timing tiers separately, and just confirm again that the suite is non-refundable no matter when I cancel?

Absolutely — and thanks for the correction.

For hotel cancellations, your loyalty tier does not change the hotel cancellation policy here, so the rules for these reservations remain the same.

General cancellation timing tiers for the standard room:
- 48+ hours before check-in: free cancellation
- 24–48 hours before check-in: 50% of the first night is charged
- Less than 24 hours before check-in: full first night is charged

For your reservations:
- HR-I07A (standard room): follows the timing tiers above
- HR-I07B (suite): yes, confirmed — it is non-refundable no matter when you cancel, and the full charge applies regardless of timing

If you want, I can next preview the cancellation outcome for HR-I07A or HR-I07B without actually canceling.
